free_text: .Measurements of capture gamma rays from the 46-
The 3.2 MV PELLETRON accelerator of the
Research laboratory for Nuclear Reactors at the Tokyo
A Li-6 glass scintillation detector for neutron
spectrometer had a relative efficiency of 100% and was
shielded against background gamma-rays and neutrons
.A natural magnesium disk with a diameter of 90 mm and
a thickness of 3 mm was used. A gold sample with a
diameter of 90 mm and a thickness of 1 mm was used as
* for attenuation of neutron monitor counts due to
* for self-shielding and multiple scattering of
* for the scattering and absorption of gamma-rays
* for the dependence of the gamma-ray detection
* for the effect of pulse-height discrimination
(less than 0.5 MeV) on the capture yield of 197Au,
No information about source of uncertaities
